title: Bridge Essay: Insula neuroanatomical networks predict interoceptive awareness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

**Insula neuroanatomical networks predict interoceptive awareness.**. Heliyon.. PMID: 37520943. DOI: 10.1016/j.heliyon.2023.e18307. Interoceptive awareness (IA), the subjective and conscious perception of visceral and physiological signals from the body, has been associated with functions of cortical and subcortical neural systems involved in emotion control, mood and anxiety disorders.
